news.summary: Preliminary unaudited data shows that AB Pieno žvaigždės recorded sales revenue of EUR 52.3 million in the first quarter of 2025, reflecting a 14.8% increase from the EUR 45.6 million reported in the same period of 2024. EBITDA for the first three months of 2025 amounted to EUR 2.0 million, whereas it stood at EUR 3.9 million in the corresponding period of the previous year. The net profit for the company in the first quarter of 2025 was EUR 0.2 million, contrasting with the EUR 2.2 million net profit achieved in the first quarter of 2024.
news.headline: AB Pieno žvaigždės' unaudited Q1 2025 results: Revenue €52.3M (up 14.8% from €45.6M in Q1 2024), EBITDA €2.0M, net profit €0.2M.
UK PUBLIC INFLATION EXPECTATIONS FOR YEAR-AHEAD FALL TO 4.0% IN MAY FROM 4.2% -CITI/YOUGOV UK PUBLIC INFLATION EXPECTATIONS FOR LONGER TERM UNCHANGED AT 4.2% IN MAY -CITI/YOUGOV

news.summary: The latest R1-0528 model boasts improved reasoning abilities, as DeepSeek claims it is catching up to the cutting-edge models of OpenAI and Google.
news.headline: DeepSeek's new R1-0528 AI model matches ChatGPT, Gemini in capabilities, narrowing gap with leading models.

news.summary: Karen Osborn from Florosa Elementary School in Mary Esther, Florida, and Nicolette Barone from Oak Park Elementary School in Tampa, Florida, have been acknowledged nationally for their groundbreaking classroom techniques that have led to remarkable increases in student achievement. The recognition was received in Tallahassee, Florida on May 29th.
news.headline: Karen Osborn and Nicolette Barone, Florida teachers, named to Curriculum Associates' 2025 Class of Extraordinary Educators™ for innovative classroom strategies and student achievement. Tallahassee, May 29.

news.summary: In Erie, Pennsylvania, on May 29, 2025, a press release revealed that Dalton S. Frasier has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Frasier was lauded for his significant contributions to advancing energy innovation through gas purification and carbon capture.
news.headline: Dalton S. Frasier named Pinnacle Professional Member of The Inner Circle for advancing energy innovation through gas purification and carbon capture in Erie, PA.

news.summary: Cambridge, Massachusetts, May 29, 2025 - Dr. Ron Meeusen, a prominent figure in biotechnology, has joined the Board of Directors at RevivBio, a pioneering biotech firm specializing in Biologics and Biosensors. Dr. Meeusen brings a wealth of experience to the board, having a strong track record in the industry. This addition is seen as a strategic move by RevivBio to enhance its leadership team as it continues to make advancements in the field.
news.headline: RevivBio appoints Dr. Ronald Meeusen to Board of Directors in biotech innovation and commercialization, enhancing leadership.

news.summary: Recently, a federal court ruled against President Trump's tariffs imposed on China, Apple, and various other countries, deeming them unlawful. However, this decision could be temporary. Following this development, S&P 500 futures saw an increase. This indicates a potential shift in market sentiment following the court's decision to cut the tariffs. Investors are closely monitoring the situation as it unfolds to assess the impact on trade relations and market stability.
news.headline: Court temporarily removes Trump's tariffs on China, Apple, and world; S&P 500 futures rise despite fading.
IDF: Following the sirens that sounded a short while ago in several areas in Israel, a missile launched from Yemen was intercepted. Sirens were sounded in accordance with protocol.

news.summary: Williams, a pipeline company, announced plans to reactivate previously stalled pipelines due to environmental concerns. This decision comes as the Trump administration urges states to increase acceptance of fossil fuel projects.
news.headline: Pipeline company Williams plans to revive N.Y. natural gas pipelines rejected under Trump admin for environmental reasons.
Sirens sound in extensive region of Israel following Yemen missile launch
Sirens are sounding across central Israel following the launch of a ballistic missile from Yemen.
IDF defense systems intercepting Yemen missile threat
A ballistic missile has been launched from Yemen at Israel, the Israeli military says.

news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a brief surge that dwindled despite a special court deeming a majority of Trump's tariffs unlawful. Nvidia saw a significant increase in value. Current index performance remains unsteady as the court decision on tariffs impacts the market. Additionally, a mix of outcomes has been observed among the latest initial public offerings (IPOs).
news.headline: Stock market indexes struggle despite court's ruling on Trump tariffs; Nvidia stock surges, mixed reactions to IPOs.

news.summary: During his recent meeting, Jerome H. Powell emphasized that policy choices will be made using meticulous, neutral, and nonpartisan evaluation.
news.headline: President meets with Powell after criticizing Fed for months. Powell emphasizes policy decisions will be made based on careful, nonpolitical analysis.

news.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd., an Israeli multinational pharmaceutical company listed on the NYSE under the ticker TEVA, recently held its 2025 Innovation & Strategy Day. During the event, the company announced the start of the acceleration phase of its "Pivot to Growth" strategy, aiming to transition into a prominent biopharmaceutical company. Teva plans to focus on enhancing its innovative medicines franchise along with maintaining a robust generics and biosimilars portfolio. CEO Richard Francis expressed the company's commitment to scaling its innovative medicines franchise while reinforcing its generics and biosimilars segment. Teva successfully completed Phase 1 of its growth strategy, witnessing nine consecutive quarters of growth. The company's emphasis on innovation was highlighted during the event, signaling a pivotal shift in its business approach. This news led to a positive market response, with Teva's shares rising due to a profitable quarterly performance, a $700 million cost-saving plan, and the momentum surrounding its biopharmaceutical pivot. The detailed article on this development can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Teva plans to reach $5 billion innovative franchise by 2030 with growth strategy, emphasizing biopharmaceuticals, generics, and biosimilars.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on May 29, 2025, the Miss Arizona USA and Miss Arizona Teen USA group welcomed Sebastien Verstraet as their new State Director. Verstraet, known for his expertise as a pageant director, celebrated photographer, and fashion show, will be leading the organization.
news.headline: Miss Arizona USA & Miss Arizona Teen USA welcome Sebastien Verstraet as new State Director, bringing years of experience.

news.summary: The Zeigler Automotive Group has been honored for the 12th time as one of the top companies to work for in Chicago by the National Association for Business Resources. This award reflects Zeigler's exceptional workplace culture and commitment to employee satisfaction.
news.headline: Zeigler Auto Group wins 12th Chicago's Best & Brightest Companies To Work For® Award for workplace culture excellence.

news.summary: Supported by bipartisan lawmakers, the proposed bill outlines regulations for digital assets and establishes clear agency responsibilities for enforcement and supervision.
news.headline: Bipartisan bill in US introduces regulatory framework for digital assets, aiming to establish rules and agency roles.
U.S. STATE DEPARTMENT: U.S. WILL NOT TOLERATE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY'S "EXPLOITATION" OF U.S. UNIVERSITIES OR THEFT OF U.S. RESEARCH INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

news.summary: WNC Roofing, LLC has achieved a significant milestone with the inauguration of its new branch in Spartanburg, South Carolina on May 29, 2025. This move comes as a culmination of over a decade of unwavering commitment to providing exceptional services in the Upstate region. Recognized for its expertise in commercial roofing, the company's expansion signifies a notable development in its operations.
news.headline: WNC Roofing, LLC opens new Spartanburg location after a decade of serving Upstate, marking a major milestone.
FORTRESS INVESTMENT CONTROLS VLSI TECHNOLOGY, JURY FINDS IN INTEL TRIAL  FINDING IS A BOON TO INTEL'S BID TO DODGE $3B PATENT VERDICTS

news.summary: For the past 20 days, the premium on Bitcoin's Coinbase has been continuously increasing due to high demand from investors based in the United States. This surge in demand is indicating a potential rally for Bitcoin, with technical analysis on charts suggesting a price target of $118,000.
news.headline: Bitcoin's premium on Coinbase rises for 20 days despite seller pressure, with potential rally to $118,000 fueled by US demand.

news.summary: The justices were tasked with determining if an agency had met federal law requirements by releasing a report spanning 3,600 pages regarding the effects of a planned railway project in Utah.
news.headline: SC limits environmental reviews, arguing over compliance with federal law for 3,600-page report on Utah railway impact.

news.summary: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE: DKS) released disappointing first-quarter 2025 results with adjusted earnings per share at $3.37, falling short of the anticipated $4.34. The quarterly sales stood at $3.17 billion, reflecting a 5.2% increase from the previous year but missing the expected $3.59 billion. The company announced its intention to acquire Foot Locker, highlighting it as a significant and transformative step. The merger aims to combine the strengths of both brands to establish a dominant global player in the sports retail sector, catering to a wider range of athletes.
news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE: DKS) disappoints with Q1, reporting $3.37 EPS (below estimated $4.34) & $3.17B sales. Eyeing Foot Locker acquisition.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Haig Partners LLC has published its Q1 2025 Haig Report®, the oldest quarterly report in the auto retail sector analyzing industry trends and their influence on dealership valuations. The report highlights a continued robust performance for numerous auto dealerships in Q1 2025, with profits experiencing just a 1% decline compared to the previous year. Presently, the average auto dealership is generating approximately double the profit compared to pre-pandemic levels. This Q1 2025 report commemorates the 11th year since the inception of The Haig Report®.
news.headline: Auto dealership profits remain high with only a 1% decrease in Q1 2025 year-over-year, making double the profit compared to pre-pandemic levels. Haig Partners LLC released its Q1 2025 Haig Report®, marking its 11th anniversary.

news.summary: Bell Techlogix, an Indianapolis-based company, has achieved certification as a Great Place To Work for the third consecutive year as of May 29, 2025. The certification, awarded by Great Place To Work, relies on feedback from employees to assess workplace satisfaction. This year, an impressive 86% of employees in the U.S. reported positive experiences with the company.
news.headline: Bell Techlogix earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ for the third consecutive year, with 86% U.S. employees satisfied.

news.summary: This week, Myriad is focusing on several key markets. One notable area of interest is the price outlook for Ethereum, with analysts forecasting a potential increase to $4,000. Another significant market is the upcoming Polish election, where experts are closely monitoring developments that could impact the political landscape. Additionally, Myriad is closely following the French Open, anticipating exciting matches and potential upsets as top players compete for the prestigious title.
news.headline: Exciting week ahead: Predictions on #Ethereum price, Polish election, and French Open in Myriad's top markets.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Saskatchewan-based company PHARMACORP RX INC. announced the submission of its unaudited financial statements and accompanying MD&A for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The Corporation, also known as PharmaCorp, listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol PCRX, expressed satisfaction with this development. Additionally, PharmaCorp disclosed the signing of non-binding letters of intent concerning the acquisition of four pharmacies, continuing their expansion efforts in the industry.
news.headline: PharmaCorp Rx Inc. reveals Q1 2025 results, filing unaudited financial statements on SEDAR. Company to acquire four pharmacies.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) has been recognized by U.S. News & World Report as one of the Best Companies to Work For in the 2025-2026 list. The editorial team of U.S. News evaluates publicly traded American companies to assist employees and job seekers in selecting suitable workplaces. The ranking includes companies in the top 25% across various sectors and industries. Travel + Leisure Co. is a leading membership and leisure travel company globally.
news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. named one of the Best Companies to Work For by U.S. News & World Report for 2025-2026.

news.summary: A groundbreaking AI algorithm called PromoterAI has been introduced by Illumina Inc. (NASDAQ: ILMN) in San Diego on May 29, 2025. This innovative algorithm is capable of decoding pathogenic regulatory genetic variants in the noncoding sections of the human genome on a large scale for the first time. Through this technology, a significant advancement has been made in accurately identifying these genetic variants, providing new insights into potential health risks and conditions.
news.headline: Illumina introduces PromoterAI, an innovative AI algorithm to decode genetic variants for rare diseases, scaling diagnosis.

news.summary: Velocity Performance Alliance (VPA) is taking the fast lane from motorsport to real estate in Los Angeles with a high-end strategy. Formed by Oasis Design & Development Corporation and Verge, this collaboration promises an exciting venture. The alliance aims to combine the adrenaline rush of motorsport with the sophistication of luxury properties. This groundbreaking partnership is set to redefine the real estate landscape. Mark your calendars for this thrilling development.
news.headline: Velocity Performance Alliance partners with Oasis Design & Development Corp and Verge for luxury auto real estate platform. NASCAR debut pending. Los Angeles, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Montreal, Theratechnologies Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its annual shareholders' meeting, which occurred virtually. The company, listed as TSX: TH and NASDAQ: THTX, is a biopharmaceutical entity.
news.headline: Theratechnologies Inc. reports voting results from their annual meeting, held virtually, on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: In São Paulo on May 29, 2025, it was reported that the nutritional supplement market in the United States is experiencing significant growth, fueled by a rising focus among consumers on health, preventive care, and longevity. Around 76% of survey participants indicated their intention to incorporate supplements into their daily routine on a regular basis.
news.headline: Brazilian company Duas Rodas introduces Cerrado-sourced Quercetin to global market; 76% of US consumers prioritize well-being with supplements.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Chicago, Black Buffalo, a prominent modern alternative to traditional smokeless tobacco, revealed Cody Garbrandt, a UFC fighter and former Bantamweight Champion, as the brand's latest ambassador. Garbrandt, renowned for his striking ability and toughness in the Octagon, joins forces with the brand to promote their products.
news.headline: UFC fighter Cody Garbrandt becomes brand ambassador for Black Buffalo, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Starting on June 1st, the National Dog Bite Awareness Campaign will be launched. In 2025, there were over 6,000 reported cases of dog attacks on Postal Service workers. As part of this year's campaign, the USPS is providing education and resources to prevent such incidents.
news.headline: USPS reports over 6,000 dog attacks on employees in 2024. National Dog Bite Awareness Campaign to begin June 1.

news.summary: A collaboration between exSat, OKX, and Standard Chartered has produced compliant and capital-efficient yield solutions by utilizing exSat's Bitcoin-native infrastructure, OKX's liquid markets, and Standard Chartered's asset custodianship. This partnership was announced in Las Vegas on May 29, 2025. The collaboration aims to offer innovative financial services leveraging these companies' expertise, with exSat being a prominent Bitcoin digital banking service provider.
news.headline: exSat and OKX partner with Standard Chartered to tap into Bitcoin yield opportunities for institutions, boosting liquidity.

Elon Musk quits his role in Trump’s gov’t as head of DOGE, while voicing frustration with rising federal spending. He promises to refocus on Tesla & SpaceX after sales dipped and protests flared. ‘The DOGE mission,’ he says, ‘must become a way of life.’

news.summary: The most recent network upgrade for Ethereum, known as Pectra, has led to increased technical efficiencies and a surge in institutional interest, as stated in a recent report by JPMorgan. The upgrade, which was implemented this month, included various Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs) aimed at improving staking performance, reward systems, and transaction processing. These alterations were designed to make Ethereum more enticing to institutional investors. JPMorgan analysts, headed by Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou, noted that while these advancements signify strategic advancement, they have not yet resulted in a significant boost in on-chain activity.
news.headline: Ethereum's Spectra upgrade attracts institutional investors, but on-chain activity remains slow, says JPMorgan.

news.summary: In a recent oversight hearing at the California Assembly on May 29, 2025, state regulators presented new findings indicating that oil refiners supplying branded stations in California have significantly benefitted from consumers. The data disclosed suggests that refiners have reportedly reaped substantial profits from operating in the state. These revelations have raised concerns about the transparency and accuracy of the financial information provided by oil refiners in the region.
news.headline: Oil refiners profiteering from consumers in California revealed at oversight hearing with regulators showing new data.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in San Francisco, aviation investment manager SKY Leasing disclosed the completion of a secured notes issuance. SLAM 2025-1 Limited and SLAM 2025-1 LLC issued $503 million worth of Notes. SLAM aims to utilize some of these proceeds for specific purposes.
news.headline: SKY Leasing closes $503 million secured notes offering by SLAM to fund aviation investments.
